snippet.title: The New Mutants | Official Trailer | 20th Century FOX
snippet.description:
20th Century Fox in association with Marvel Entertainment presents “The New Mutants,” an original horror thriller set in an isolated hospital where a group of young mutants is being held for psychiatric monitoring. When strange occurrences begin to take place, both their new mutant abilities and their friendships will be tested as they battle to try and make it out alive.

In Theaters August 28, 2020

Directed by: Josh Boone 

Screenplay by: Josh Boone & Knate Lee

Produced by: Simon Kinberg, p.g.a., Karen Rosenfelt, p.g.a., Lauren Shuler Donner

Cast: Maisie Williams, Anya Taylor-Joy, Charlie Heaton, Alice Braga, Blu Hunt, Henry Zaga 

Connect with The New Mutants Online:
Visit The New Mutants WEBSITE: http://www.TheNewMutants.com 
Like The New Mutants on FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/NewMutantsFilm
Follow The New Mutants on TWITTER: https://www.twitter.com/NewMutantsFilm 
Follow The New Mutants on INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/NewMutantsFilm

#NewMutants

About 20th Century FOX:
Official YouTube Channel for 20th Century Fox Movies. Home of Avatar, Aliens, X-Men, Die Hard, Deadpool, Ice Age, Alvin and the Chipmunks, Rio, Peanuts, Maze Runner, Planet of the Apes, Wolverine and many more.
